name: Joseph Schillinger
abstract: Joseph Moiseyevich Schillinger (Russian: Ио́сиф Моисе́евич Ши́ллингер; 1 September [O.S. 20 August] 1895 (other sources: 31 August [O.S.

about_quotes.speaker: Gary Burton
about_quotes.evidence: He got the chance to buy a school that was run by a kind of well-known classical composer and teacher, Joseph Schillinger, who had passed away.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gary Burton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Toshiko Akiyoshi
about_quotes.evidence: I knew about the book, a lot of so noted, like Gershwin for example, they studied with Joseph Schillinger.
about_quotes.doc_title: Toshiko Akiyoshi interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 17, 1999
